message:
fix(lint): resolve React hooks and type errors

- Move useCallback hooks before early returns in CoachExplanation
- Move useCallback hooks before early returns in QualityCheckpoint
- Replace `as any` with proper type assertions in session-machine.ts
- Escape JSX quotes with HTML entities

Fixes react-hooks/rules-of-hooks and @typescript-eslint/no-explicit-any errors.
